step_rationale: Adaptor protein in GPVI signaling cascade; required for collagen-induced platelet activation.
mechanism: SLP-76 scaffolds GPVI signaling to couple collagen recognition to platelet secretion and aggregation.

references.title: Plant-based Food Cyanidin-3-Glucoside Modulates Human Platelet Glycoprotein VI Signaling and Inhibits Platelet Activation and Thrombus Formation.
Alteration of platelet GPVI signaling in ST-elevation myocardial infarction patients demonstrated by a combination of proteomic, biochemical, and functional approaches.
